prompt: Create a high-end conceptual beverage advertisement for Sprite with a single cold green soda can as the hero product, centered slightly below mid-frame on a vertical 3:4 canvas. The can is glossy emerald green aluminum with realistic condensation droplets, a silver rim and base, and the white Sprite logo large across the front with a small yellow-green lemon-lime icon above it. The scene contrasts heat versus refreshment: the left half of the ground is dry, cracked desert earth in warm ochre and burnt orange tones with golden dust particles rising, while the right half is wet, icy, and teal-blue with splashing water mist, crushed ice pieces, and a cool vapor cloud exploding behind the can. Use a rich green gradient background, darker at the edges and brighter behind the product, with cinematic studio lighting, crisp commercial photography realism, high contrast, and shallow depth of field. Add exactly one text block in the upper left corner reading PAUSE\nTHE\nHEAT.; set it in bold uppercase sans-serif, left aligned, with “PAUSE” and “THE” in white and “HEAT.” in yellow-green. Keep the composition minimalist and premium, Apple-level advertising art direction, no extra objects, no people, no watermark, no additional text, ultra-detailed droplets and ice, sharp product focus, dramatic refreshing energy.
